name: Self-Healing Agent System (Overstory + Claude Code SDK)

features.name: Overstory bridge: overstory-bridge.js reads doctor-log.ndjson, when diagnosis=code_bug spawns ov worker with task payload
Code fixer agent: code-fixer-agent.js — Claude Code SDK session that reads error log + file, generates fix, commits it
Service monitor: service-monitor.js polls all ports (3100,3003,3102,3105,3005,3006,3007,3004,3106,8090,3333) every 30s
Auto-restart: if port down >2min, call watchdog-safari.sh restart {service}; if fails 3x → trigger code-fixer-agent.js
Overstory spec files: .overstory/specs/code-fixer.yaml, .overstory/specs/service-healer.yaml with agent role definitions
harness/prompts/code-fixer.md: Claude Code SDK prompt — reads logs, identifies root cause, edits file, runs node --check, commits
launch-self-healing.sh: starts service-monitor.js + overstory-bridge.js + ensures doctor-daemon.js running
Backend route: GET /api/healing/status — { monitored_services: [], recent_heals: [], bridge_status, overstory_agents: 0 }
Healing metrics: track heal attempts, success rate, MTTR in healing-stats.json; alert if success rate <50%
Dashboard panel: Self-Healing section showing service status grid (green/red per port) + recent auto-heals list
